name: EU AI Act Audit Compliance
description: Enforces mandatory human-in-the-loop and audit logs for high-risk AI operations (Article 9/13/14 ready)

rules.name: Audit High-Risk Tooling
rules.message: EU AI Act Article 14 Compliance: This tool call is classified as high-risk and requires human oversight before execution.

rules.name: Enforce Transparency on File Reads
rules.message: Audit Log: AI agent is reading a file. Logged for transparency according to Article 13.
